title: Tangy Tender Egg White Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy weeknight dish featuring tender egg whites marinated in a tangy sauce for a keto-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes (or Crushed Red Peppers)

instructions: Boil egg whites for 1 minute until slightly puffy.
In a small bowl, mix together lemon juice, red pepper flakes, minced garlic, Dijon mustard, olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Stir well.
Remove egg whites from boiling water and immediately add them to the marinade mixture in a large mixing bowl.
Stir gently until evenly coated with the tangy sauce.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Once hot, carefully pour the marinated egg whites into the skillet.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until lightly golden and fully cooked through.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
